reviews.comment:

I filled up with gas and went to the bathroom. More or less clean. I didn't go shopping, eating, or drinking. Lots of people waiting....

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer un alto en la ruta y descansar un rato. Arboleda y mesas con bancos para comer o tomar algo.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop along the way and rest for a while. A grove of trees and picnic tables with benches for eating or having a drink.
